payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark brown paneled wooden cabinet door with visible wood grain and semi-gloss finish; top edge and a vertical seam between doors are visible, the right side is edge-cropped and the surface shows slight wear/scuffing — approximate camera distance ~0.6 m.
